title: SignAlignLM: Integrating Multimodal Sign Language Processing into Large Language Models
research_areas: T14 Language Modeling (including training, fine-tuning, representation learning, and generation of synthetic data)
T17 Multimodality, Cross-modality (including Sign Languages, Vision and Other Modalities), Multimodal Applications, Grounded Language Acquisition
T16 Machine Translation (including Speech-to-Speech) and Translation Aids
